text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Three days from now, I will ask each of you for your reasoning again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like you to provide a concrete example of your plan to me
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I'm lost in thought, trying to figure out how best to
approach the question Symboli Rudolf posed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, now... We meet again. Is the opposite seat taken?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. The cafeteria's starting to fill up, and I don't want to take
up a table by myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My apologies if I'm prying, but... You seem troubled.
choice_data_list:
I was actually thinking about what you said
yesterday.

I was actually thinking about what you said
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I had a sneaking suspicion you might be. It seems I've placed a
burden upon your shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It might not be my place to say this, but try not to overthink it.
There's a time to reflect, and a time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let's see. While you're here, why not nourish the mind with something
sweet?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The natural sugars in fruits, vegetables, and grains help the brain to
function, and can enhance your concentration.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I were to recommend something from today's menu, I would say the
seasonal fruit salad is your best bet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I suppose I'm preaching to the choir, aren't I? You are a
professional trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to lecture you. I'm afraid my mind tends to get lost in
details.
choice_data_list: You really think everything through, huh?
You really think everything through, huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Proper nutrition is vital to maintaining peak physical and
mental well-being.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Choosing the optimal meal for your current condition is quite an
important consideration.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, this applies to things other than food as well. Every aspect
of one's daily life must be contemplated mindfully.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's key to think of the broader perspective—how each small decision
is an invaluable step toward the top.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's really nothing special. I'm not used to being complimented
on my diet choices.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was taught to think strategically, ever since I was little. It's become
so ingrained in me, there's no fixing it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But, well... I suppose that's part of the problem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's eyes flick to another part of the cafeteria. I follow
her gaze.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Y-yikes... It sounds like the president's having a super-serious talk
with that trainer...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Let's go sit somewhere else. We don't want to interrupt them with our
chatter!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...You see what I mean? I sat with you to avoid taking that empty
table, but the students still won't sit at it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A student council president should be approachable—someone they
can look to for advice. A leader they can trust to guide them...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems I tend to intimidate my peers instead, what with
how stiff my conversations tend to become.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If only I were capable of more casual and engaging conversation, I
could be more approachable...
choice_data_list: How about we try a practice conversation now?
How about we try a practice conversation now?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Practice? You mean, with you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my apologies. It's just... How do I put it? You're really going the
extra mile for me. I wasn't expecting such a kind offer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: All right, why not? Let's give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Could you start us off with a topic? Anything will do—choose
whatever you feel most comfortable with.
choice_data_list: What are your hobbies, aside from running?
What are your hobbies, aside from running?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hobbies, is it? That's certainly a good warm-up topic.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I think I would have to say chess. It's fun to play, of course, but it's
equally thought-provoking to analyze past score sheets.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Reading the board, predicting the opponent's moves, planning each
action to advance a bigger goal... You could even say chess is a
microcosm of our lives—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wait. That was not at all a casual conversation, was it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I know Rome wasn't built in a day, but this is more challenging
than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! I've actually been researching other ways to
enhance small talk!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Namely in the form of jokes. Some witty repartee to lighten up a room
and put people at ease!
choice_data_list: Okay! Hit me with your best shot!
Okay! Hit me with your best shot!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well. Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I was walking down the street when I saw a dog with
so marvelous a coat that I couldn't help but exclaim, "My, that coat
is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: —paws-itively wonderful!"

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well? What do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This... is a side of Symboli Rudolf I didn't expect. I feel like I've
gained some insight into who she is as a person.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hrm... "paws-itively wonderful..." I thought that was pretty clever...
